title: stelis saltatrix
intro: Stelis saltatrix, also known as the saltatrix orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical forests in Central and South America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Stelis saltatrix include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve circulation, and boost the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, with the root and stem being used in herbal preparations to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
